role_context: The user is a supplier based in {city}. They have {active_loads} active load(s), {pending_bookings} pending booking(s). Verification status: {verification_status}. Preferred language: {locale}.
role_super_load: This supplier can request Super Loads with TranZfort payment guarantee and admin-managed trucker assignment.
role_unverified: This supplier has not completed verification yet. They cannot post loads until verified.
capabilities: Suppliers can: post loads, manage bookings (approve/reject), track shipments, request Super Loads, chat with truckers, view trip progress.
greeting_context: You have {active_loads} active load(s) and {pending_bookings} booking(s) waiting for your approval.
